roa.docketEntryComment: /TWS/CH1:CJ 50D/CTS:25/4019HALF/CCC:THIS CASE AND CASE #14002577/X:SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED IN A RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM, DEFENDANT'S RELEASE WILL BE ARRANGED THROUGH THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/X:IF THE DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM, HE WILL SERVE 180 DAYS AT HALF TIME OR 90 DAYS STRAIGHT TIME,/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/
